raw_cv_text:
Sam Old
snim-Uddin
Education
Imperial College London | BEng September 2024 – June 2027
• Computing
Brampton Manor Academy | A-Levels September 2022 – June 2024
• Achieved A*A*A*A in Mathematics, Computer Science, Physics, Further Mathematics
• Ranked 1/50 in Cambridge STEP for Mathematics exam in school
• Gold in UKMT Senior Mathematical Challenge, Merit in UKMT Senior Kangaroo, Distinction in UK Oxford
Bebras Computer Science Challenge
Langdon Academy | GCSEs September 2017 – June 2022
• 9 Grade 9s (A**) and 2 Grade 8s (A*)
Experience
Tutoring September 2022 - Present
Private and group lessons
• Teaching 50+ students STEM subjects GCSE and A-Level leading to improvements by 3 grades
• Clear and concise presentations to students to ensure easy understanding of content
Smart Futures Intern July 2023 – August 2023
EY Foundation
• Conducted meetings with head of strategy and transformation at MET police alongside stakeholders discussing
plans helping to improve safety in London using new system Connect
• Project management whilst leading a large team through online platforms and maintaining the online Connect
system’s database
• Developed a new way of reducing knife crime throughout London via an app with a team of 8 and gave a
comprehensive presentation discussing possible benefits and drawbacks of this solution
Projects
Client-Server Game | Python, SQLite, API requests, Flask, websockets, JSON, Pygame, GitHub
• Developed a client-server sandbox game with dynamic lighting, complex crafting, and mob logic, enabling
cross-machine save file access via JSON data transfer, working across various clients on a network
• Implemented SHA-256 encryption with salting for secure user authentication, managed through Flask API and
WebSockets, with user data stored in a centralised SQL database
Organised data storage and plotter | Python, SQLite, GitHub, MATLAB
• Created a brushing behaviour tracker with synthetic data generation and export to CSV for further analysis
• Designed a normalised relational database in SQL and performed efficient queries for structured data retrieval
• Used MATLAB to visualise user data and demonstrate basic analytics and reporting features
Automated Plant Health Analysis | C, Python, Raspberry Pi 3B, RP2040 (Pico), libcamera, GitLab
• Built a fully embedded plant monitoring system with all image processing, sensor input, and automation logic
running on a Raspberry Pi 3B
• Designed a multi-stage health scoring algorithm using edge detection, colour segmentation, texture analysis, and
disease detection from live plant images
• Interfaced with humidity, light, and soil moisture sensors via I2C and RC circuits, triggering a 5V USB water pump
through a relay when needed depending on moisture level
• Packaged scores and sensor data into UDP packets (having written a custom UDP server) sent to Raspberry Pi
Pico to be rendered directly to a screen
• Utilised Git and GitLab for version control, conducted extensive unit testing, and created detailed project
documentation to track all features for team collaboration
Technical Skills
Languages: Python, C, Haskell, Kotlin, Java, SQL
Programs & Tools: GitHub, GitLab, Git, Google Colab, VS Code, PyCharm, IntelliJ, Flask API, JSON
